titleStmt.title: SII 6.840: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 840. (A.R. No. 284-Q of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
